name: United Airlines

carryOn.notes: Must fit in overhead bin or under seat.

batteryRules.lithiumIon: Spare lithium batteries must be in carry-on
batteryRules.spareBatteries: Max 100Wh per battery. 101–160Wh with airline approval.
batteryRules.laptops: Allowed in carry-on. Screen at security checkpoint.

restrictedItems: Smart luggage with non-removable batteries over 160Wh

faqs.question: How much does United charge for checked bags?
faqs.answer: For most domestic flights, the first checked bag costs $35 and the second costs $45. United MileagePlus Premier members and cardholders may receive complimentary checked bags.

faqs.question: What size carry-on does United allow?
faqs.answer: United allows carry-on bags up to 22 x 14 x 9 inches including handles and wheels, plus one personal item up to 17 x 10 x 9 inches.
